subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou seest and knowest that the transgressors have transgressed against Thy loved ones who have turned towards the Dawning-Place of Thy Revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی تری و تعلم بان المعتدین اعتدوا علی احبائک الذین اقبلوا الی مشرق وحیک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause
